name: SOC Framework - Microsoft Entra ID
description: SOC Framework correlation rules for Microsoft Entra ID sign-in events. Detects failed authentication, risky sign-ins, and suspicious identity activity from the msft_azure_ad_raw dataset (Office 365 data source, Microsoft Graph API). XSIAM has native behavioral identity analytics that overlap on production tenants — this pack is for immediate PoV demonstration. Document overlap during PS handoff.
author: Palo Alto Networks
